name: Stepper
description: Display content divided into a steps sequence
searchText: stepper display content divided into a steps sequence @mantine/core /core/stepper active allownextstepsselect autocontrast children color completedicon contentpadding icon iconposition iconsize keepmounted onstepclick orientation progressicon radius size wrap allowstepclick allowstepselect color completedicon description icon iconposition iconsize label loading orientation progressicon state step withicon

props.name: active
props.description: Index of the active step

props.name: allowNextStepsSelect
props.description: When true, users can click and jump to any step. When false, users can only navigate to completed steps

props.name: autoContrast
props.description: When true, automatically adjusts the icon color in completed steps to ensure sufficient contrast against the step background color

props.name: children
props.description: Stepper.Step components

props.name: color
props.description: Key of theme.colors or any valid CSS color, controls colors of active and progress steps

props.name: completedIcon
props.description: Step icon displayed when step is completed

props.name: contentPadding
props.description: Key of theme.spacing or any valid CSS value to set padding-top of the content

props.name: icon
props.description: Step icon

props.name: iconPosition
props.description: Icon position relative to the step body

props.name: iconSize
props.description: Controls size of the step icon, by default icon size is inferred from size prop

props.name: keepMounted
props.description: If set, all step content is kept mounted. React 19 Activity is used to preserve state while content is hidden.

props.name: onStepClick
props.description: Called when a clickable step is clicked with its 0-based index. Not called for the currently active step.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Stepper orientation

props.name: progressIcon
props.description: Step icon displayed when step is in progress

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set steps border-radius

props.name: size
props.description: Controls size of various Stepper elements

props.name: wrap
props.description: Determines whether steps should wrap to the next line if no space is available

props.name: allowStepClick
props.description: Set to false to disable clicks on step

props.name: allowStepSelect
props.description: Should step selection be allowed

props.name: color
props.description: Key of theme.colors, by default controlled by Stepper component

props.name: completedIcon
props.description: Step icon displayed when step is completed

props.name: description
props.description: Step description

props.name: icon
props.description: Step icon, defaults to step index + 1 when rendered within Stepper

props.name: iconPosition
props.description: Icon position relative to step body, controlled by Stepper component

props.name: iconSize
props.description: Icon wrapper size

props.name: label
props.description: Step label, render after icon

props.name: loading
props.description: Indicates loading state of the step

props.name: orientation
props.description: Component orientation

props.name: progressIcon
props.description: Step icon displayed when step is in progress

props.name: state
props.description: Step state, automatically set by Stepper component based on active prop. stepInactive: not reached, stepProgress: current, stepCompleted: passed

props.name: step
props.description: 0-based step index, automatically set by Stepper component

props.name: withIcon
props.description: When false, hides the step icon. Useful for creating compact steppers with only labels
